series_metadata.series_description: Results of criminal records checks conducted by Ohio BCI &I and the FBI for license and limited permit applicants.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: For "No records" identified criminal background checks, record that record was received and then immediately dispose of the record. For criminal background checks with identified criminal records, contact the court of jurisdication to obtain certified public records, then shred Crimal Background Check., Paper: Shred
